title: Fix MongoDB Aggregation Pipeline to Ignore Embedded Fields

statement.markdown: You are given a MongoDB collection with documents that may contain embedded fields. Write a function that takes an array of documents and a list of fields to ignore as input, and returns a new array with the embedded fields removed. The function should use the MongoDB aggregation framework to process the documents.
statement.inputFormat: Array of documents and list of fields to ignore
statement.outputFormat: Array of documents with embedded fields removed
statement.notes: The function should return a new array with the embedded fields removed. The original documents should not be modified.

constraints.description: The number of documents in the input array

examples.explanation: The function should remove the embedded fields from the documents

hints.text: You can use the MongoDB aggregation framework to process the documents

editorial.title: Editorial
editorial.intuition: The function should use the MongoDB aggregation framework to process the documents and remove the embedded fields
editorial.bruteForce: You can use a loop to iterate over the documents and remove the embedded fields
editorial.optimalSolution: Use the MongoDB aggregation framework with the $project operator to remove the embedded fields
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The function should return a new array with the embedded fields removed
commonMistakes: Not using the MongoDB aggregation framework
Not removing the embedded fields correctly
